text: ‘As well they might’; literally, ‘according as they were’. The author seems to be taunting the Samaritans with their Gentile origin. But the Greek might mean ‘according as they gained their request’; Josephus alleges that the Samaritans themselves asked leave of the king to re-dedicate their temple.
‘The Ptolemies’; the Greek has ‘Ptolemy’, cf. note on 4.45.
